message:
feat(web): Add WebSocketClient class and reconnect unit tests

- Create WebSocketClient class with auto-reconnect support
- Export reconnect utilities from websocket/index.ts
- Add comprehensive unit tests for backoff calculation (20 passing)
- Integrates with existing websocket-context.tsx

Closes: flywheel_gateway-9nb
